metadata.description: Self-hosted marketplace for the tailrocks-skills plugin. Add this repository directly: /plugin marketplace add tailrocks/tailrocks-skills

plugins.name: tailrocks-skills
plugins.description: Cross-agent Tailrocks skills for strict Rust, Axum, TypeScript, TanStack, code-health ratchets, and the roadmap delivery pipeline (idea, brainstorm, research, record-decision, finalize, plan, reconcile, /goal handoff)
